visa.note: US Citizen with full working rights.

work_experience.title: Senior Marketing Manager
work_experience.description: Led integrated marketing campaigns across digital and traditional channels for Fortune 500 clients. Managed a $4M annual media budget and a team of 6 across content, paid media, and brand. Grew client social media engagement by 38% YoY through data-driven content strategy.

work_experience.title: Digital Marketing Strategist
work_experience.description: Developed and executed SEO, SEM, and paid social strategies for consumer goods and retail clients. Managed Google Ads and Meta campaigns with combined monthly spend of $800K. Improved average campaign ROAS from 2.1x to 3.6x through continuous A/B testing and audience segmentation.

work_experience.title: Marketing Analyst
work_experience.description: Conducted consumer research and market analysis to inform brand positioning for two personal care product lines. Built reporting dashboards in Tableau to track campaign KPIs across 12 markets. Coordinated agency briefings and supported campaign production timelines.

work_experience.title: Marketing Coordinator
work_experience.description: Supported campaign planning and execution for FMCG and healthcare clients. Managed social media scheduling, influencer outreach, and content calendar across Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter. Assisted in quarterly brand audits and competitor benchmarking.

certifications: Google Ads Certified — Search, Display, Video
Meta Blueprint Certified — Media Planning Professional
